reviews.review_description:
A hybrid of sabers, pistols, and more, all wrapped in a cyberpunk aesthetic. The campaign features 16 missions so far. I was pleasantly surprised to discover two additional mini-games in the menu, an arcade mode and a Runner-style motorcycle game.

I’ve just finished the game, and it was a very good experience overall.

I'm a sucker for Rythmgames. And this one is fantastic. It's Like Pistol Whip with the Mechanics of Beat Saber and Pistol Whip. Please dear devs give us more 😁. I'm starting to Check the posibillity of Custom Songs. I'm Not a big Fan of Technostyle Music, nonetheless the Songs in this Game are great, but I thought.. man this one would be even more perfect with Punk-/Rock-/Metalsongs. Test of time will Show If this one stays my Nr1 of Rythmgames (Take Care Synth Raiders 😂). But yeah I think so.

I'm a fan of the beat-matching games like Pistol Whip, Ragnarock, and Beat Saber and was looking for something new and exciting so when I found this, I thought it'd be a fun romp before getting back into the other games but it quickly became my go-to for something that makes me sweat. It has both the swords from Beat Saber and the guns from Pistol Whip and swaps between them on the fly. You can even deflect bullets with your sword in one hand while firing back with your gun in the other. Pistol Whip feels like elementary school compared to this. It really deserves more attention so we can get more custom songs but running around like a cyborg bladerunner ninja never felt cooler than this!

I’m loving this game. It’s like Until You Fall and Pistol Whip had a baby in a cyber punk world. It’s early access, so the music is limited to 16 songs so far, but they are good and give a nice workout. 

There’s a Discord, and I’m pretty sure I could add my own songs but I haven’t yet.

I’m playing in a small space, and while I duck, squat, and lean, I don’t need to move my feet more than two feet to either side and no need to move front or back. There’s some fun surprises in this game that I don’t want to spoil, so my advice is to click around and explore. Hats off the dev for a fantastic game!

It's a kind of rhythm fitness game, the one you use to get your heart pumping. My introverted heart started pumping right away on seeing The Figure in the main room, staring at me, ready to ask how I have been... Luckily, it does not talk, phew :)) 
The game has cool aesthetic, very fitting music, little surprises now and then. Beware of the turbulent falls, kinda tough on the vestibular system. But adding the spice.  

P.S. I like to think that the environment is that one prison planet locked in a bubble outside the universe ;)

I play this alot on pcvr and thrilled it got on the meta store. Played the demo a decent amount and its really good. I recommend this to anybody who likes rythm games. Only 1 person behind all this made the game the music everything very impressive.  Im glad I can now play this on standalone aswel. 

Slash and shoot and dodge on the great music with some suprises . The looks of the game is perfect. Every map looks more pretty as you go

developer_response.body: Thank you very much!!! I'm very glad that now you can play my game anywhere))) I hope you will be just as pleased with future updates!!!

reviews.review_title: Swords and guns at the same time!
reviews.review_description:
CYBRID's subtitle would be "Pistol saber"
This is a rhythm game where you alternate between using a sword and a gun to the beat of original tracks. It's incredibly fun, and I love that you can simultaneously enjoy the exhilaration of swinging a sword and the thrill of firing a gun! I really hope to see multi-language support and for the sub-games from the Steam PC version to be added in a future update!
I'm really enjoying this game. Great quality, fabulous music and a good workout. I look forward to the developers future games. Highly recommend :-)

There are much better games. Namely, Pistol Whip and Beat Saber. I like the concept, and at times, Cybrid is fun. But I think it misses the mark. It's significantly harder than either Pistol Whip or Beat Saber, and in a frustrating way. Usually, you won't have enough time to react... the enemies are so tightly packed together that it's chaos. There are barely any modifiers, which gives the edge to Pistol Whip. I also want to note that there are minigames to round out the experience, but they're kind of atrocious, and the game never explains the purpose of them (like the endless levels to your right are never labelled as "endless.")

I like the concept, but the execution is, for the most part, a swing and a miss.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry you weren't satisfied with the game. I hope you'll have more fun with other games. Thank you for your feedback. I'll take your comments into account and try to improve in the future. Once again, I apologize for not meeting your expectations. I'll try harder!

reviews.review_description:
Well done for achieving this, love it on the PC. I purchased the Quest version immediately. I use Cybrid as part of my VR fitness routine , to have on Quest is much easier to access for me, Thank You for all your hard work.
P.S. For fitness I use the speed boost option to level up on each difficulty level and use the slice in any direction option also.

Intense sword-and-pistol gameplay set to a perfectly fitting soundtrack. Cybrid is a true challenge. After failing a level multiple times, the payoff only gets sweeter. The point-based hit system, combined with the mix of slashing and shooting in rhythmic flow, makes every victory feel truly earned.

The customization menu is excellent, and the modifiers are essential for progressing and shaping the experience. I was immediately humbled trying to dive into a new level on the harder settings...it’s something to work toward, and work it is. The game can be legit cardio. Deflecting bullets with a sword in one hand while firing a pistol in the other from a crouch, then quickly standing to switch into dual-sword slashes before ducking and dodging obstacles. It’s all perfectly timed when you pull it off. 

The transitions between sections can feel completely disorienting at first, but I’ve learned to embrace that chaos. I love how the character will do a backflip only to be met with enemies whilst upside down. The game drops into slo-mo at that point, giving just enough space to react—but not enough to hesitate. Stick the landing, catch your balance, and there’s always another unforgiving enemy ready to punish a mistake. 

I wouldn’t change a thing about this game. Honestly, it’s sooo good.

Not a beat saber fan at all, so I won't compare it to this. So I'd describe it as Pistol Whip with swords and The Matrix style slow mo jumps, drops and level changes are so cool! The music fits the game aesthetic, so not sure why some reviews are complaining about that. But some Industrial metal would fit really well and it would be amazing
💙💜Perfect mix of action and amazing visuals.  It combines elements of our favorite VR games into one fantastic experience!  5 outta 5! #spreadvr #spreadxr 🥽🥽❤️

Thank You Tom Reason. This Game Is Amazing.
I really enjoy jumps from one area to other area. 
Hope for more Levels/Stages in Future or DLC packs.
I love all the 16 Levels.

I've been playing this for about an hour and it's absolutely great. Looks really nice and the mechanics are fun.  I'll have many hours happy gaming with this. And the soundtrack is banging too.  Great work

developer_response.body: Thank you so much)))!!! I'm glad you're satisfied! I worked really hard to port the game so that it wouldn't be too different from the PC version and would still be visually and technically pleasing.

reviews.review_title: Love the Pistol Whip * Beat Saber combo!
reviews.review_description:
Great job dev! 
Tons of fun to play :)
The free demo had me hooked and I'm having a blast unlocking all the levels in the full game :)
